metadata.wiki_note: Use the House Number field to pass the DAY of the week for your NORMAL collections. [Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday]. [OPTIONAL] Use the 'postcode' field to pass the WEEK for your garden collection. [Week 1/Week 2]. [OPTIONAL] Use the 'uprn' field to pass the DAY for your garden collection. [Monday/Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday/Friday]
